workspace.settingsDescription: Manage workspace details and who has access.
workspace.name: Name
workspace.addMemberDescription: Invite an existing user by email, or create a new account by providing a password.
workspace.roleOwnerHint: Full access — can manage members, settings, and all data
workspace.roleEditorHint: Can read and write all financial data
workspace.roleManagerHint: External administrator with effective owner rights
workspace.passwordHint: If the email isn't registered yet, this password creates the account. They can change it after logging in.
workspace.removeConfirmDescription: Remove {{email}} from this workspace? They'll lose access to all data inside it. This does not delete their user account.
workspace.createDescription: A workspace holds its own accounts, categories, budgets, and goals. You can invite people into it from the workspace settings page.
workspace.archiveHint: The workspace is hidden from the list and switcher. Data is preserved.
workspace.archiveConfirmDescription: The workspace "{{name}}" will be removed from your list. Data is preserved and an admin can restore it later.

app.name: Securo
app.updateAvailableHint: A newer release ({{version}}) is available on GitHub

cmdk.title: Command palette
cmdk.description: Search transactions, accounts, categories and more.

empty.title: No results for "{{query}}"
empty.hint: Try a different keyword, a payee name, or an amount.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Group your accounts into named collections (e.g. Business, Long-term, Daily) to filter your dashboard, reports and transactions.
collections.empty: No collections yet. Create one to group your accounts.
collections.name: Name
collections.confirmDeleteDesc: "{{name}}" will be removed. Your accounts and data are not affected.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to access your account
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.registrationError: Error creating account. Please try again.
auth.registerDescription: Create your account to get started
auth.twoFactorDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.setup2faDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account by enabling two-factor authentication with an authenticator app.
auth.disable2faDescription: Enter your password and a verification code to disable two-factor authentication.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.totalBalanceTooltip: The main figure sums all accounts converted to your preferred currency. The "By currency" line shows totals grouped by each account's native currency, unconverted — so the component in your preferred currency may not match the total (the rest comes from converting the other currencies). "Net" adjusts the total for what you owe or are owed in group splits.
dashboard.pendingSharesTooltip: Reflects what you owe / are owed across your groups, before any settlement.
dashboard.accrualNote: Credit-card transactions are grouped by bill due date (accrual mode).
dashboard.spendingProjection: At this pace, you'll spend {{amount}} by month end

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactions.syncedInfo: Bank-synced transaction — only category and notes can be edited
transactions.bulkAddToGroupExactHint: Exact amounts must be set per transaction. Use Equal or Percent to apply the same rule across all selected.
transactions.bulkAddToGroupPartial: {{added}} added to group, {{skipped}} skipped (transfers or already split)
transactions.conversionHint: optional — leave blank for auto rate
transactions.fxFallbackTooltip: Rate unavailable — using 1:1 fallback. Edit to set manually.
transactions.fxFallbackBanner: Exchange rate unavailable — using fallback (1:1). Set the rate manually or check your FX provider settings.
transactions.attachmentsUpload: Drop files here or click to upload
transactions.attachmentTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 10 MB.
transactions.attachmentTypeNotAllowed: File type not supported. Allowed: jpg, jpeg, png, webp, gif, heic, pdf
transactions.transferCrossCurrency: Currencies differ — amount will be converted automatically
transactions.transferSameAccount: Source and destination must be different
transactions.transferInfo: This is a transfer — changes to description, date, and notes will apply to both sides
transactions.transferTooltip: Transfers are excluded from report and dashboard totals
transactions.linkTransferDescription: Mark these two transactions as a single inter-account transfer. They will be excluded from spending and income reports.
transactions.linkTransferSelectTwo: Select exactly 2 transactions to link them
transactions.linkTransferAmountMismatch: Amounts don't match. This is fine for cross-currency transfers or when fees apply, but double-check before linking.
transactions.linkTransferCascadeWarning: Once linked, editing or deleting one side will affect the other.
transactions.linkTransferInvalidPair: To link as a transfer, pick one debit and one credit from different accounts.
transactions.linkTransferPickerDescription: Pick the counterpart from another account. Best matches by date and amount appear first.
transactions.linkTransferNoCandidates: No matching transactions found within 30 days.
transactions.createCounterpartDescription: If the other side is a manual account, create the matching transaction automatically.
transactions.unlinkTransferConfirm: Unlink this transfer? Both transactions will be treated as regular transactions again.
transactions.confirmTransferCategoryTitle: Apply this category to the paired transfer too?
transactions.confirmTransferCategoryDesc: Transfers come in pairs. You can update only this transaction or apply the same category change to both sides.
transactions.ignoreTransferHint: Ignored transactions will not show on reports and balance

filtersBar.amountHint: Leave one empty for an open-ended range. Set both to the same value to match exactly.
filtersBar.pickRange: Pick a start and end date

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.confirmDeleteDesc: This action is irreversible. It will also delete every transaction, import record and recurring transaction attached to this account, and unlink any goals that were tracking it.
accounts.balanceCreditCardHint: Enter how much you currently owe on this card as a positive number. Leave at 0 if you have no debt.
accounts.displayNameHint: Overrides the default provider name everywhere in the app.
accounts.typeOverrideHint: Overrides the account type reported by your bank. Syncs won't change it back.
accounts.cycleMissingHint: Fill in the statement close and due days to unlock cycle filtering, due-date alerts, and the bill view.
accounts.ccSettingsHint: These fields are optional, but filling them in unlocks cycle filtering, due-date alerts, and bucketing purchases into the correct bill.
accounts.confirmDisconnectDesc: This will unlink {{institution}} and remove synced accounts and transactions from the app. This action is irreversible.
accounts.confirmClose: Close this account? It will be hidden from totals.
accounts.confirmCloseBank: This will also stop syncing this account.
accounts.connectorNotConfigured: This connector requires configuration. Set up the required credentials to enable it.
accounts.selectCountryDesc: Choose the country your bank is in
accounts.selectBankDesc: Choose your bank from the list of supported institutions
accounts.noInstitutionsFound: No banks available for this country

oauthCallback.title: Connecting your bank
oauthCallback.linking: Importing your accounts, balances and transactions. This can take a minute.
oauthCallback.dontClose: Don't close this tab — we'll redirect you when it's ready.
oauthCallback.linkAccountsFirstDesc: Your Enable Banking account is in restricted mode, so accounts have to be pre-linked in the Enable Banking portal before they can be imported here.
oauthCallback.retry: I've linked my accounts, try again
oauthCallback.missingState: OAuth state is missing or invalid. Please start the connection again.

tokenConnect.defaultDescription: Generate a setup token at the provider and paste it below to link your accounts.
tokenConnect.tokenHelp: The setup token is single-use. Securo claims a private access URL from it and stores it encrypted.

simplefin.title: Connect via SimpleFIN
simplefin.description: SimpleFIN is a read-only bank data protocol. Go to the SimpleFIN Bridge, pick your bank, and copy the setup token back here.

pluggy.description: Open finance provider for Brazilian banks

enable_banking.description: European banks via PSD2 open banking

simplefin.description: US and international banks via SimpleFIN Bridge

connections.displayNameHint: Leave empty to show the institution name.

goals.title: Goals
goals.name: Name
goals.empty: No goals yet. Create your first goal to start tracking!
goals.dashboardEmpty: No goals yet. Set a target and start tracking your progress!

recurring.title: Recurring Transactions
recurring.fxEstimate: Estimate based on latest exchange rate ({{rate}}). Final amount may change.

rules.packMissingCategories: This pack needs default categories you don't have. Enable "Create missing categories" and try again.
rules.createMissingCategories: Also create default categories the pack needs
rules.duplicateName: A rule with this name already exists
rules.createdAndApplied: Rule created and applied to {{count}} transactions
rules.name: Name

categories.title: Categories
categories.treatAsTransferDesc: Transactions in this category won't count as income or expense in reports. Use this for movements between your own accounts (investments, savings deposits, loan repayments).
categories.ignoreTransferDesc: Ignored transactions won't show on income or expense reports.

import.acceptedFormats: Accepted formats: OFX, CSV, QIF, CAMT
import.columnMappingHint: Map your CSV columns to Securo fields. Leave on auto-detect to keep the detected column.
import.mappingNeeded: We couldn't recognize your CSV columns automatically. Map them to Securo fields below to continue.
import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Bank statement
import.dragOrClick: Drag a file or click to select
import.undoDescription: This will delete {{count}} imported transactions from {{filename}}. This action cannot be undone.

assets.title: Assets
assets.name: Name
assets.marketPriceSourceTooltip: Price refreshed automatically from market data
assets.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this asset and all its value history?
assets.syncedReadOnly: Synced assets are managed by the connection
assets.walletNamePlaceholder: e.g. US Stocks, Long-term fixed income
assets.confirmDeleteWallet: The wallet will be removed and its assets become ungrouped. No asset data is lost.
assets.emptyWallet: No assets in this wallet yet
assets.noWalletsHint: Create a wallet first with the "New Wallet" button
assets.syncedFromHint: Originally synced from {{source}} — you can rename freely, sync matching uses the connection ID.
assets.confirmRegenerate: Growth parameters changed. All automatically generated values will be deleted and recalculated. Manual values will be kept.

reports.noData: No data available for this period
reports.includeEstimateHelp: Estimates future inflows and outflows from your history average (up to 12 months, or all available data), instead of using your recurring rules

payees.title: Payees
payees.name: Name
payees.mergeDescription: All transactions from the selected payees will be reassigned to the target payee. The other payees will be deleted.

splitGroups.title: Groups
splitGroups.emptyHint: Create a group to split expenses with people, departments, or projects.
splitGroups.name: Name
splitGroups.kindHint: Drives the labels and reports — pick the closest fit.
splitGroups.memberEmailHint: Optional — useful if you invite them as a Securo user later.
splitGroups.linkedUserHint: Pick an existing Securo user to link the member, or leave unlinked to add a non-user (e.g. someone who doesn't have an account yet).
splitGroups.willLinkToUser: Will link to existing Securo user {{email}}
splitGroups.sharedRowTooltip: Your share in a group split. Tap to open the group.
splitGroups.byCategoryHint: How the group's expenses are distributed
splitGroups.balancesHint: Who owes whom, computed from splits minus settlements.
splitGroups.affectAccount: Also record as a transaction in my account
splitGroups.affectAccountHint: A debit will be created on your account for this amount and linked to the settlement.
splitGroups.splitNoGroups: Create a group first to split a transaction.
splitGroups.splitNoMembers: Add members to the group first.
splitGroups.equalHint: Each selected member gets an equal share.

setup.title: Welcome to Securo
setup.description: Create your admin account to get started.
setup.error: Failed to create account. Please try again.
setup.name: Your name
setup.brandSubtitle: Self-hosted personal finance that keeps you in control. Your money, your data, your rules.

update.title: Server update
update.description: A new version of Securo is available. Consider updating if you:
update.reasonFeatures: Want to access the latest features and improvements
update.reasonBugs: Are experiencing issues that may be resolved in the new version
update.releaseNotesHintAfter: for any breaking changes before updating.
update.autoCheckDisabled: Automatic update checks are turned off. Turn them on to know when a new version is available.

users.title: User Management
users.confirmDeleteDesc: This will permanently delete the user {{email}} and all their data. This action cannot be undone.
users.addDesc: Create a new user account with access to the application.

settings.title: Admin Settings
settings.registrationDesc: When disabled, only admins can create new user accounts.
settings.accountingSubtitle: How credit card transactions are counted in dashboards, reports, and budgets.
settings.accountingCashDesc: Credit card purchases count on the day they happen (default).
settings.accountingAccrualDesc: Credit card purchases count on the bill's due date — reflects actual cash flow.
settings.providerCategoriesDesc: When off, synced transactions arrive uncategorized so only your Rules apply.
settings.numberFormatDesc: How amounts are displayed across the app for everyone.
settings.numberFormatAutoDesc: Follows each currency's convention, like €1.000,00 or $1,000.00.
settings.dateFormatDesc: How dates are displayed. Month names always follow each user's app language.
settings.dateFormatAutoDesc: Match the number format above (day-first in Europe, month-first in the US).

onboarding.sidebarDesc: Use the sidebar to navigate between sections of the app.
onboarding.dashboardDesc: Your financial overview at a glance — balances, trends, and spending.
onboarding.accountsDesc: Manage your accounts or connect your bank.
onboarding.transactionsDesc: View, search, and categorize your transactions.
onboarding.importDesc: Import bank statements in OFX, CSV, QIF, or CAMT format.
onboarding.categoriesDesc: Organize your spending with custom categories.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Build conversational assistants on top of your Securo data. Each agent can have its own knowledge base, tools, and provider.

suggestions: what's my biggest expense category this month?
show my expenses by category as a pie chart
compare my income vs expenses over the last 6 months
how much have I spent in total this month?
which categories grew the most month over month?
summarize my spending trends and flag anything unusual
what's my net worth right now?
how am I doing against my budgets this month?

empty.title: No agents yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first agent — give it a system prompt, pick a model, and start chatting with your finances.

form.name: Name
form.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a helpful financial assistant. Always cite sources...
form.connectionRequired: Pick a connection — agents need one to talk to an LLM.
form.needConnectionHint: An agent needs a connection (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, …) to talk to a model. Set one up, then come back here.
form.autoContextHint: Prepend a small primer with your name, currency, today's date, and account list at the start of every conversation. Saves the agent from having to ask. Turn off for pure knowledge-base agents.

detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this agent? Conversations and uploaded knowledge will also be removed.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.subtitle: PDF, MD, or TXT. Pinned docs always go into context.
knowledge.empty: No knowledge yet. Upload a doc to enrich this agent.

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Choose which tools this agent may call. Discovered from your MCP servers.
tools.empty: No tools discovered. Is the MCP server running? (`docker compose --profile agents up -d`)

conversation.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This will also remove all messages.

connections.title: LLM Connections
connections.subtitle: Add the LLM providers you want to use — local Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Pick one per agent.
connections.name: Name
connections.baseUrlRequired: Endpoint URL is required for this provider
connections.ollamaHint: If Ollama runs on your host machine, use http://host.docker.internal:11434 (Mac/Windows) or your host IP (Linux).
connections.openaiCompatHint: Just paste the host:port (e.g. http://192.168.1.142:1234). The /v1 path is added automatically. From inside Docker on Mac/Windows, replace localhost with host.docker.internal.
connections.apiKeyPlaceholder: sk-... or leave blank for local providers
connections.apiKeyPlaceholderEdit: Leave blank to keep the existing key
connections.apiKeyHint: Stored encrypted using your instance secret. Never returned by the API.
connections.setAsDefault: Use as default for new agents
connections.deleteConfirm: Delete connection "{{name}}"? Agents pointing at it will fall back to the instance default.

empty.title: No connections yet
empty.subtitle: Add a connection to point Securo at your local Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
